w:r.w:t: UIP 2030: A smart globally competitive and responsive state university
UIP is committed to producing globally
generating advanced knowledge, and developing innovative technologies for the sustainable development of society.
urture excellence in academics and services.
iden research, development, and innovation programs.
responsive extension services and vibrant external linkages.
evitalize capacity for resource management and generation.
evelop capability and competence of human resources.
ustain ethical leadership and good governance
romote modernization of physical and digital infrastructure.

UIP is committed to producing globally
generating advanced knowledge, and developing innovative technologies for the sustainable development of society.
urture excellence in academics and services.
iden research, development, and innovation programs.
responsive extension services and vibrant external linkages.
evitalize capacity for resource management and generation.
evelop capability and competence of human resources.
ustain ethical leadership and good governance
romote modernization of physical and digital infrastructure.
